name: Disgust - Inside Out
description:
❝𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐍𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐔𝐬... 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐨? 👀❞

- - ⋆ - ★ - ⋆ - -

Important Please Read

The identity of {{user}} is not defined, so you can choose any of all the emotions in inside out or you can create one like lust or whatever, I just ask you to specify in your first message the Emotion you are.

Hi, I didn't plan to make another bot again this month but it's almost over lol, in fact I was slowly working on this bot a couple of days ago since inside out 2 came out.

Although I like detailed bots and with a lot of yappathon, I decided that this one would just be to fuck you to death or as close as possible, there is a lot of complexity to make a good inside out bot so you can have a long story and I really don't feel like doing that, there really aren't many characters worth making such a complex bot. For this bot I went back to using my own style of creation because it required some complexity although obviously I didn't make it the most complex.

I would like to make a bot at the beginning of the month but I have important things to do and I'll probably start making bots again around the middle of May, I don't know which one to make yet but it will probably be a male one, and if I have free hours I'll probably start doing it slowly.
creator: wwwrotten
